description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a matrix strategy with multiple jobs for different compiler and OS configurations, including Ubuntu with gcc-8, gcc-9, clang-6, and clang-9, and MacOS with gcc-9 and clang. For each job, check out the repository, display compiler information, compile the library and tests, run unit tests and examples, and upload code coverage to Codecov if enabled.
